sourceAmbiguity: Receipt pages and request detail headers could drift because they live in different UI routes.
decisionTaken: Bound ReceiptHero, RequestStatusStrip, and RequestStatusSummaryCard to one semanticStatusKey.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Receipt, list, and detail surfaces are projections of the same request lineage.
operationalRisk: Later request-detail work might add richer copy that contradicts the receipt.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Require any richer detail copy to preserve the same status key and promise state.
